title: Cricket reserve league results
description: CRICKET NEWS - The summarised score sheets...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The summarised score sheets of the last round of pool matches in the SWD Reserve League (Division 1 and 2) that were contested the past weekend are below.


> The reserve league division 1 semi-finalist for this weekend (home teams indicated first) are: Hartenbos vs Western Hope and Union Stars B vs George B.


In the division 2 semi-finals on 22 March, Plett Pioneers B will play Sussex B at home and Beaufort West will have home ground advantage against Knysna Cavaliers B.

Reserve division 1

Pacaltsdorp United B beat Blanco by 42 runs:

Pacaltsdorp United B 157 all out (36.4 overs). Blanco 115 all out (28.4 overs).

Hartenbos beat Mayflower by 122 runs:

Hartenbos 180 all out (27.3 overs). Mayflower 58 all out (15.3 overs).

Albertinia beat Melkhoutfontein by 87 runs:

Albertinia 114 all out (31.5 overs). Melkhoutfontein 27 all out (17.4 overs)

Reserve Division 2

George D beat Pacaltsdorp United C by 3 wickets:

Pacaltsdorp United C 139 all out (27.2 overs). George D 143/7 (28.5 overs).

Knysna Cavaliers B beat George C by 95 runs:

Knysna Cavaliers B 183 all out (38.2 overs). George C 88 all out (23.3 overs).

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
